title: Hegseth says the US has ‘flattened’ Iran’s defence industry and military capabilities
summary_full: The US Secretary of Defence said Iran "can no longer build missiles, build rockets, build launchers, or build UAV"
summary_public: The US Secretary of Defence said Iran "can no longer build missiles, build rockets, build launchers, or build UAV"

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: flattened’ Iran’s defence industry and military capabilities
